name: Pieczen Siekana - Klops -- Polish Meat Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry onion in butter until transparent, not yellow.
2. Combine the meat, kidney fat, salt pork, bread crumbs, onion, egg yolks, and seasonings. Mix thoroughly with your hand.
3. Shape into a loaf and rub with butter.
4. Bake at 350°F for one hour. Baste often.
5. In the last 15 minutes of baking, sprinkle flour on meat and add cream.
